title: hydrangea × agricola
intro: Hydrangea × agricola, also known as Bigleaf Hydrangea, is a hybrid deciduous shrub native to North America, resulting from the cross between Hydrangea macrophylla and Hydrangea quercifolia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of Hydrangea × agricola include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which are commonly used herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
